'''dabaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylan|xylan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-b-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylan|xylan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dabaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæbægæth|dæbægæth]] || [[word:dæbægæj|dæbægæj]] || [[word:dæbægæsh|dæbægæsh]] || [[word:dæbægæ|dæbægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dababagath|dababagath]] || [[word:dababagaj|dababagaj]] || [[word:dababagash|dababagash]] || [[word:dababaga|dababaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dabagath|dabagath]] || [[word:dabagaj|dabagaj]] || [[word:dabagash|dabagash]] || [[word:dabaga|dabaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dabafgath|dabafgath]] || [[word:dabafgaj|dabafgaj]] || [[word:dabafgash|dabafgash]] || [[word:dabafgaf|dabafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dabagatha|dabagatha]] || [[word:dabagaja|dabagaja]] || [[word:dabagasha|dabagasha]] || [[word:dabagaka|dabagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dabagath|dabagath]] || [[word:dabagaj|dabagaj]] || [[word:dabagash|dabagash]] || [[word:dabaga|dabaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dabagathal|dabagathal]] || [[word:dabagajal|dabagajal]] || [[word:dabagashal|dabagashal]] || [[word:dabagakal|dabagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dabagathatha|dabagathatha]] || [[word:dabagajaja|dabagajaja]] || [[word:dabagashasha|dabagashasha]] || [[word:dabagaka|dabagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dabagathan|dabagathan]] || [[word:dabagajan|dabagajan]] || [[word:dabagashan|dabagashan]] || [[word:dabagakan|dabagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dabagathaoro|dabagathaoro]] || [[word:dabagajaoro|dabagajaoro]] || [[word:dabagashaoro|dabagashaoro]] || [[word:dabagakaoro|dabagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
